title: EAI London Shelf Brackets | White 350x300mm / 14x12 Inch Shelving Support Bracket | Pack of 20
features: QUALITY: Our London white shelf brackets are manufactured from high quality steel with a bright white powder coat finish to guarantee strength and durability
SUITABIITY: Our shelving brackets are ideal for offices, sheds, garages, kitchens and warehouses, they offer a quick and economical way to create shelving
SIZE: 350x300mm / 14x12 Inch - Please refer to our images for detailed dimensions.
PACK SIZE: Pack of 20 White Brackets. Requires size 4.0mm / 8g screws for fitting - order separately to suit your application
COMPATIBLE WITH: See our full range of other compatible products & size variations on our store page. Click on EAI under the product title to view.
description: The original London pattern shelf bracket are an ideal solution for creating economical shelving. They are manufactured from high quality steel with a bright white powder coat finish for guarnateed durability. Ideal for creating shelving in offices, shed, garages, warehouses and many more situations.
